subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast sought the shelter of thy Supreme Lord! The written and recorded words, their purport and meaning, have been comprehended and known: remoteness and separation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من استجار ربه الاعلی مسطور مرقوم مضمونش مفهوم و معلوم گردید دوری و مهجوری
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @firmness in the Covenant, @Shrines and Holy places, @prayer for specific individuals; groups
